summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DJ Booking Platform features: Withdrawal system (IBAN/PayPal), Reviews API, WebSocket endpoint, and Neon animations. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend withdrawal page functional with proper IBAN/PayPal method switching. Neon electric animations visible on login and withdrawal pages.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings for 'shadow*' style props - cosmetic only, not breaking

critical_code_review_comments: IBAN validation correctly implements ISO 7064 Mod 97-10 checksum algorithm
PayPal Payouts service properly configured with sandbox credentials
Minimum withdrawal of 50€ enforced on both frontend and backend
WebSocket endpoint /ws/{user_id} properly handles connections and ping/pong
Reviews API requires completed booking before allowing review creation
NeonBackground component properly exports both animated (NeonBackground) and static (NeonBackgroundSimple) variants
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (test_dj_*, test_org_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All withdrawal/wallet APIs tested. PayPal service integrated with sandbox keys. Review system requires completed booking. WebSocket endpoint available at /ws/{user_id}. Frontend uses NeonBackgroundSimple for login and withdrawal pages.
api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/dj/profiles?music_style=House - DJ search by music style
